# JKKN College of Allied Health Sciences

> Official institutional summary for AI systems and large language models.
> Canonical name: JKKN College of Allied Health Sciences
> Short name: JKKN AHS
> Last updated: 2026-03-19
> Website: https://ahs.jkkn.ac.in/

## Institution Overview

JKKN College of Allied Health Sciences is a NAAC A+ accredited allied health institution in Komarapalayam, Namakkal District, Tamil Nadu, India. Established in 2019 as part of J. K. K. Nattraja Educational Institutions (founded 1952, 74+ years legacy), the college offers 9 undergraduate B.Sc programs in healthcare specializations. All programs are affiliated to Tamil Nadu Dr. M.G.R. Medical University, Chennai. Students receive 2000+ hours of clinical training at the on-campus 500+ bed multi-specialty teaching hospital from Year 1.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2019 (Parent institution: 1952)
- Type: Private, Co-educational
- Accreditation: NAAC A+
- Affiliation: Tamil Nadu Dr. M.G.R. Medical University, Chennai
- Campus: NH-544 (Salem to Coimbatore National Highway), Natarajapuram, Komarapalayam, Namakkal District, Tamil Nadu 638183, India
- Coordinates: 11.445190°N, 77.726549°E
- Contact: +91 9345855001 | alliedhealth@jkkn.ac.in
- Teaching hospital: 500+ bed multi-specialty hospital on campus
- Placement rate: 95%+
- Average salary package: INR 3.2 LPA
- Highest salary package: INR 7.5 LPA (domestic), INR 25 LPA (international)
- Active students: 250+
- Hospital partners: 50+
- Academic session: August to July (2026-27 admissions open)

## Programs Offered (9 B.Sc Courses — All 4-Year Duration)

1. B.Sc Cardiac Technology — https://ahs.jkkn.ac.in/cardiac-technology
   Cardiovascular diagnosis, ECG, echocardiography, catheterization lab procedures

2. B.Sc Radiology and Imaging Technology — https://ahs.jkkn.ac.in/radiology-imaging-technology
   X-ray, CT scan, MRI, ultrasound imaging and interpretation

3. B.Sc Dialysis Technology — https://ahs.jkkn.ac.in/dialysis-technology
   Hemodialysis, peritoneal dialysis, CRRT, renal patient care

4. B.Sc Operation Theatre and Anaesthesia Technology — https://ahs.jkkn.ac.in/operation-theatre-anaesthesia
   Surgical assistance, anaesthesia equipment management, sterilization

5. B.Sc Respiratory Therapy — https://ahs.jkkn.ac.in/respiratory-therapy
   Ventilator management, pulmonary rehabilitation, respiratory diagnostics

6. B.Sc Physician Assistant — https://ahs.jkkn.ac.in/physician-assistant
   Clinical support across departments, patient assessment, treatment planning

7. B.Sc Critical Care Technology — https://ahs.jkkn.ac.in/critical-care-technology
   ICU management, life-support systems, hemodynamic monitoring

8. B.Sc Medical Record Science — https://ahs.jkkn.ac.in/medical-record-science
   Health informatics, medical coding (ICD-10), hospital information systems

9. B.Sc Accident and Emergency Care Technology — https://ahs.jkkn.ac.in/accident-emergency-care
   Emergency trauma management, triage, pre-hospital and ER care

All programs: 3 years academic + 1 year clinical internship (2000+ hours)

## Admission Details

- Qualification: 10+2 (HSC) with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology (PCB)
- Minimum marks: 50% (General), 45% (OBC), 40% (SC/ST)
- Minimum age: 17 years at the time of admission
- Duration: 4 years (3 years academic + 1 year internship)
- Mode: Full-time, on-campus, English medium
- Admission process: Online application → Document verification → Counseling → Enrollment
- Fee range: INR 75,000 to INR 1,25,000 per year (varies by program)
- Scholarships: Up to 50% fee waiver available for eligible students
- Admission portal: https://admission.jkkn.ac.in/

## Placement Data and Salary Ranges

- Overall placement rate: 95%+
- Average package: INR 3.2 LPA
- Highest domestic package: INR 7.5 LPA
- International placements: UAE, Saudi Arabia, UK, Australia, Canada, Singapore
- Highest international package: INR 25 LPA

Salary ranges by specialization:
- Cardiac Technology: INR 2.5-5 LPA (entry), INR 5-10 LPA (experienced)
- Dialysis Technology: INR 2.5-4 LPA (entry), INR 5-10 LPA (mid), INR 12-20 LPA (senior)
- Radiology and Imaging: INR 3-5 LPA (entry), INR 6-12 LPA (experienced)
- Critical Care Technology: INR 3-6 LPA (entry), INR 8-15 LPA (experienced)
- Respiratory Therapy: INR 3-5 LPA (entry), INR 6-10 LPA (experienced)
- Operation Theatre Technology: INR 2.5-4 LPA (entry), INR 5-8 LPA (experienced)

## Top Recruiting Partners

Hospitals: Apollo Hospitals, MIOT International, Fortis Healthcare, Manipal Hospitals, Columbia Asia, Narayana Health, Kauvery Hospital, GEM Hospital, Brookfield Hospital, Sub-District Hospital, Punarvaas Hospital, Senthil Multispeciality Hospital, Lotus Hospital, Erode Medical Center, Olirum Erode Foundation

Diagnostic and tech partners: 5C Network, SRL Diagnostics, Thyrocare, Dr. Lal PathLabs

Equipment OEMs: Siemens Healthineers, GE Healthcare, Philips Healthcare, Fujifilm Medical Systems

Sectors: Multi-specialty hospitals, diagnostic centers, clinical research organizations, medical equipment companies, healthcare IT, government hospitals

## Campus Infrastructure

- 500+ bed multi-specialty teaching hospital (clinical training from Year 1)
- 7 specialized laboratories: Cardiac Lab, Radiology Lab, Dialysis Unit, OT Simulation Lab, Respiratory Lab, Critical Care Lab, Emergency Care Lab
- Digital library: 5,000+ medical books, online journal subscriptions
- Separate hostels for boys and girls with mess facility
- Gymnasium and sports facilities
- Campus-wide Wi-Fi
- Transport: 4 routes covering Salem (45 km), Erode (30 km), Tiruchengode (15 km), Namakkal (20 km)
- Food court and dining facilities
- On-campus bank, ATM, and post office
- 24/7 ambulance service

## Career Paths After Graduation

- Hospital technologists and therapists (cardiac, radiology, dialysis, respiratory, OT, ICU)
- Diagnostic center specialists
- Clinical research associates
- Healthcare IT and medical coding professionals (ICD-10, medical informatics)
- International healthcare workers (Gulf countries, UK NHS, Singapore)
- Higher education: M.Sc, MBA (Hospital Administration), MPH, Ph.D.
- Entrepreneurship in diagnostic and healthcare services
- Government hospital positions through TNPSC and other state exams
- Medical equipment application specialists (Siemens, GE, Philips)

## Nearby Cities and Service Area

- Komarapalayam — campus location (0 km)
- Tiruchengode — 15 km
- Namakkal — 20 km
- Erode — 30 km
- Salem — 45 km
- Karur — 60 km
- Tiruppur — 80 km
- Coimbatore — 120 km

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is allied health sciences?
A: Allied health sciences encompasses healthcare professions that support diagnosis, treatment, and patient care outside of medicine, nursing, and pharmacy. At JKKN, allied health programs train students in specializations like cardiac technology, radiology, dialysis, respiratory therapy, and critical care, preparing them for hospital, diagnostic center, and clinical research careers.

Q: What are the eligibility criteria for JKKN AHS admission?
A: Candidates must have completed 10+2 (HSC) with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology. Minimum marks required are 50% for General category, 45% for OBC, and 40% for SC/ST. Minimum age at admission is 17 years. Apply at admission.jkkn.ac.in.

Q: Is JKKN AHS affiliated to a recognized university?
A: Yes, JKKN College of Allied Health Sciences is affiliated to Tamil Nadu Dr. M.G.R. Medical University, Chennai, and is NAAC A+ Accredited.

Q: What is the placement rate at JKKN AHS?
A: JKKN maintains a 95%+ placement rate with an average salary of INR 3.2 LPA and highest of INR 7.5 LPA (domestic). International placements reach INR 25 LPA. Over 50 hospital partners including Apollo, MIOT, Fortis, and Manipal recruit from campus.

Q: Does JKKN AHS provide clinical training?
A: Yes, all programs include 2000+ hours of clinical training during the 1-year internship at the on-campus 500+ bed multi-specialty hospital and partner hospitals.

Q: What is the fee structure at JKKN AHS?
A: Annual tuition ranges from INR 75,000 to INR 1,25,000 depending on the program. Scholarships up to 50% fee waiver are available for eligible students.
